title: Pebble Paths
description: Pebble Paths adds a charming stony texture to your walkways.
body:
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b14fed710449340dbdfb355568169894a6807f88_0.webp)

Pebble Paths is a simple yet elegant resource pack that enhances the standard dirt path textures by adding small, realistic pebbles. This subtle change brings more depth and detail to your paths, making them feel more natural and immersive in your Minecraft world. Whether you're building villages, gardens, or rustic landscapes, Pebble Paths will add a charming stony texture to your walkways.

***

## **Support the work**

If you enjoy what I create, supporting the page helps me spend more time on updates, polishing features, fixing issues, and creating new content for future releases.

Every bit of support helps keep development going — thank you for making the next update possible.
